html:
Exclusive to:

“Can be placed on dirt ground to change the type of ground.”

-

Moon Crater Turf is a craftable Turf Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is found in the Celestial Tab, requires 1 Moon Rock and 2 Moon Shards to craft, and can only be crafted when near the Celestial Altar.

Plants like Berry Bushes, Grass Tufts, Saplings, Spiky Bushes, Lureplants, Pine Cones, and Birchnuts can be planted on these Turfs.

Trivia

  • Moon Crater Turf was introduced in the Turn of Tides update.

Gallery

  • Moon Crater Turf texture.
TurfsCraftable Items

Moon Crater Turf is a craftable Turf Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is found in the Celestial Tab, requires 1 Moon Rock and 2 Moon Shards to craft, and can only be crafted when near the Celestial Altar.
Plants like Berry Bushes, Grass Tufts, Saplings, Spiky Bushes, Lureplants, Pine Cones, and Birchnuts can be planted on these Turfs.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Moon Crater Turf was introduced in the Turn of Tides update.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Moon Crater Turf là ​​một Vật phẩm Turf chế tạo được dành riêng cho Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong Return of Them. Nó được tìm thấy trong Thẻ Thiên Thể, cần 1 Đá Mặt Trăng và 2 Mảnh Trăng để chế tạo và chỉ có thể chế tạo khi ở gần Bàn thờ Thiên thể.

'''Moon Crater Turf''' is a craftable [[Turf]] [[Item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. It is found in the [[Celestial Tab]], requires 1 [[Moon Rock]] and 2 [[Moon Shard]]s to craft, and can only be crafted when near the [[Celestial Altar]].

Plants like [[Berry Bush]]es, [[Grass Tuft]]s, [[Saplings]], [[Spiky Bush]]es, [[Lureplant]]s, [[Pine Cone]]s, and [[Birchnut]]s can be planted on these Turfs.

=={{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* Moon Crater Turf was introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#Turn of Tides|Turn of Tides]]'' update.
